title: verbascum pulvinatum subsp. regelianum
intro: Verbascum pulvinatum subsp. regelianum, also known as the Regel's mullein, is a subspecies of the Verbascum pulvinatum plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the figwort family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum pulvinatum subsp. regelianum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
